segments.text: if a man is overtaken in any trespass, you who are spiritual restore such a one in a spirit of gentleness, considering yourself lest you also be tempted.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Bear one another's burdens, and so fulfill the law of Christ.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For if anyone thinks himself to be something, when he is nothing, he deceives himself.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: But let each one examine his own work, and then he will have rejoicing in himself alone, and not in another.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For each one shall bear his own load.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Let him who is taught the word share in all good things with him who teaches.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Do not be deceived, God is not mocked; for whatever a man sows, that he will also reap.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For he who sows to his flesh will of the flesh reap corruption, but he who sows to the Spirit will of the Spirit reap everlasting life.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: And let us not grow weary while doing good, for in due season we shall reap if we do not lose heart.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Therefore, as we have opportunity, let us do good to all, especially to those who are of the household of faith.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: See with what large letters I have written to you with my own hand!
As many as desire to make a good showing in the flesh, these would compel you to be circumcised, only that they may not suffer persecution for the cross of Christ.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For not even those who are circumcised keep the law, but they desire to have you circumcised that they may boast in your flesh.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: But God forbid that I should boast except in the cross of our Lord Jesus Christ, by whom the world has been crucified to me, and I to the world.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For in Christ Jesus neither circumcision nor uncircumcision avails anything, but a new creation.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: And as many as walk according to this rule, peace and mercy be upon them, and upon the Israel of God.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: From now on let no one trouble me, for I bear in my body the marks of the Lord Jesus.
Brethren, the grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with your spirit. Amen.
segments.speaker: Paul
